outages.headline: Cargo throughput at Port of Antwerp-Bruges dips in H1 2026 on geopolitical tensions, weak demand
outages.summary: The Port of Antwerp-Bruges on Thursday reported a 2.4% decline in cargo throughput in the first half of 2026, citing geopolitical tensions, trade disruption and weak industrial demand. The Belgian port handled 133.9 million tonnes of maritime cargo during January-June, with the decline driven primarily by weaker container traffic. Container throughput fell 1.5% in 20ft ...

outages.headline: GMS Week 29 – BLOCKADE RETURNS, TOLL RISES
outages.summary: The second act arrived with a name this time, and it was not “ceasefire.” Five consecutive days of American strikes through Wednesday hit Iranian positions from Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island to Sirik, while Washington reinstated the naval blockade of Iranian ports lifted during June’s interim peace.
